narrative: The generated UI matches the user spec precisely and is fully interactive. Visual render (Chrome screenshot) shows: bold title '影片轉檔工具', dashed-border drag-drop area with '拖曳影片檔案到這裡', green '選擇檔案' button, and '轉檔任務' panel. Clicking the button correctly triggers the native file picker (proven by observed event chatter). Programmatic injection of a synthetic test_video.mp4 (1KB) drove the task through PENDING (等待處理) → PROCESSING (with progress bar) → SUCCESS (完成, in green), produced output filename 'output_89269b2.mp4', and rendered the blue 下載 download button. HTML is well-formed (DOCTYPE present, all tags balanced, single matched script block). All Traditional Chinese spec terms render correctly (no mojibake). No artifact-originated console errors. The SHA256 routine is a JS stub and conversion is setTimeout-simulated — this is a front-end mock without a real FFmpeg backend, but that matches what cmd_generate produces. Pi6 Step 3 preview is GREEN.
notes: Chrome MCP `navigate` tool rewrites bare `file://` URLs to `https://file://...`, which broke direct loading. Worked around by serving the artifact via `python3 -m http.server 47821` and navigating to http://localhost:47821/index.html. Server was stopped after evidence capture.
Screenshots are returned inline by Chrome MCP and not persisted to a disk path; their IDs are recorded above for traceability within the conversation transcript.
